name: LAS VEGAS SANDS CORP
summary: Las Vegas Sands Corp. (LVS) is a Fortune 500 company and leading global developer and operator of Integrated Resorts featuring premium accommodations, casino gaming, retail malls, convention and exhibition (MICE) facilities, celebrity chef restaurants, and entertainment. It owns and operates properties in Macao (through 74.80% ownership of Sands China Ltd.) including The Venetian Macao, The Londoner Macao, The Parisian Macao, Four Seasons Macao, and Sands Macao, as well as Marina Bay Sands in Singapore.
